title: Valhelsia: Plasma
description: Enhance your Minecraft experience with built-in shaders, client-side optimization and visual improvements. Host singleplayer worlds and play with your friends anywhere.
body:
![Header](https://zupimages.net/up/23/22/duio.png) Valhelsia: Plasma is a Minecraft modpack designed to become your ultimate companion for your vanilla adventures. The modpack provides built-in shaders, client-side optimization, visual enhancements and some QOL features to your game. ##

Join us on our [Discord server](https://discord.gg/rdfQuaM) to get the latest news, changelog and to get support if you have any problems. We also have an extremely active chat channel and an image gallery submitted by members of the community.
## 🚀 Performance Enhanced performance with a collection of optimization mods, including [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium), [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium), [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium), [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric), and [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton). These mods deliver optimal performance and smoother gameplay, allowing you to enjoy Minecraft with improved frame rates and reduced lag.
![Vanilla](https://zupimages.net/up/23/22/566e.png) Vanilla ![Valhelsia: Plasma](https://zupimages.net/up/23/22/kt5l.png) Valhelsia: Plasma ![Valhelsia: Plasma + Shader](https://zupimages.net/up/23/22/rkoq.png) Valhelsia: Plasma + Shader
## 🎮 Play with your friends easily Thanks to the [Essential](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) mod, you can now play with your friends just by simply open a world and click "Invite" in the ESC menu. ## 📦 Built-in shaders Valhelsia: Plasma contains two shader packs, [Complementary Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) and [Complementary Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound), both of which provide stunning visual enhancements with realistic lighting, dynamic shadows, and vibrant colors, transforming your Minecraft world into a visually breathtaking experience. ## 🌠 Visual enhancements This modpack includes the [Xali's](https://modrinth.com/user/xalixilax) resource packs, adding transitions between blocks, bushy look to leaves, while staying in the vanilla theme of Minecraft. Additionally, the modpack includes [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality), which enhances the game with an array of new particles like crystal sparkles, particles on mob hitting, custom blob particles for slimes, and environmental particles to your Minecraft world. ## ⚙️ QOL features Stay connected with your friends with in-game messenger, across worlds and servers. Easily access and share screenshots directly from the game. Enjoy the vibrant and user-friendly F3 interface with [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3), which allows you to quickly find the information you need. ## 📄 Credits
Mods List - [Continuity](https://modrinth.com/mod/continuity) by peppercode1 - [Visuality](https://modrinth.com/mod/visuality) by PinkGoosik - [Crafting Tweaks](https://modrinth.com/mod/crafting-tweaks) by BlayTheNinth - [CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn) by shsupercm - [Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) by yurisuika - [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by coderbot - [Cherished Worlds](https://modrinth.com/mod/cherished-worlds) by TheIllusiveC4 - [Your Options Shall Be Respected](https://modrinth.com/mod/yosbr) by shedaniel - [Falling Leaves](https://modrinth.com/mod/fallingleaves) by randommcsomethin - [Concurrent Chunk Management Engine](https://modrinth.com/mod/c2me-fabric) by ishland - [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by malte0811 - [Krypton](https://modrinth.com/mod/krypton) by astei - [Exordium](https://modrinth.com/mod/exordium) by tr7zw - [Reese's Sodium Options](https://modrinth.com/mod/reeses-sodium-options) by FlashyReese - [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by jellysquid3 - [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by juliand665 - [Eating Animation](https://modrinth.com/mod/eating-animation) by theoness1 - [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by Prospector - [Auth Me](https://modrinth.com/mod/auth-me) by axieum - [Starlight](https://modrinth.com/mod/starlight) by spottedleaf - [Indium](https://modrinth.com/mod/indium) by comp500 - [BetterF3](https://modrinth.com/mod/betterf3) by treyruffy - [ESSENTIAL](https://modrinth.com/mod/essential) by SparkUniverse - [Light Overlay](https://modrinth.com/mod/light-overlay) by shedaniel - [Clean Tooltips](https://modrinth.com/mod/clean-tooltips) by stal111 - [Puzzle](https://modrinth.com/mod/puzzle) by Motschen
Resource Packs List - [xali's Enhanced Vanilla](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-vanilla) by xalixilax - [xali's Bushy Leaves](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-bushy-leaves) by xalixilax - [xali's Enhanced Jungle Wood](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-enhanced-jungle-wood) by xalixilax - [xali's Potions](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/texture-packs/xalis-potions) by xalixilax - [xali's Enchanted Books](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enchanted-books) by xalixilax - [xali's Enhanced Biome: River and Pond](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/xalis-enhanced-biome-river-pond) by xalixilax
Shaders List - [Complementary Shaders - Reimagined](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-reimagined) by EminGT - [Complementary Shaders - Unbound](https://modrinth.com/shader/complementary-unbound) by EminGT
##
We are proud to partner with Proton to offer you encrypted and user-friendly services for email, calendar, file storage, VPN, all designed with one principle in mind: your data, your rules. Feel free to explore, as there is a free version available for each of their products!
